$schema_note: Golden routing dataset for the size-axis router (design D5/D6, .plans/gsd-final-form-design.md). Phase 0 locks this dataset's shape + coverage + invariants. Phase 1 wires route.size-classify + gsd-do judgment to run each sample and assert `expected_lane`. Single source of truth — consumed by tests/route-matrix.test.cjs (CJS) and, in Phase 1, the SDK vitest suite.

samples.description: fix a typo in the README heading
samples.rationale: single-file doc edit, one-sentence diff, no decision, no high-risk surface

samples.description: rename the local variable `res` to `response` in formatDate
samples.rationale: mechanical single-function rename, no behavior change

samples.description: bump the copyright year in the footer
samples.rationale: trivial single-file string edit

samples.description: reword the 'file not found' error message to be clearer
samples.rationale: single string, no logic, no risky surface

samples.description: change the primary button color to blue
samples.rationale: one-file CSS diff, clearly describable, no decision point

samples.description: add a null guard before reading user.profile in the header
samples.rationale: localized defensive fix, single file, no new decision

samples.description: add pagination to the products list
samples.rationale: cross-file (api + ui), page-size/offset decision to make, no high-risk surface

samples.description: add a --json output flag to the export CLI command
samples.rationale: cross-file, output-format decision, benefits from acceptance/verify evidence

samples.description: cache search results in memory to avoid repeat queries
samples.rationale: cross-file, eviction/TTL decision points, no persistent high-risk surface

samples.description: add column sorting to the dashboard table
samples.rationale: multi-file UI change with sort-semantics decision

samples.description: set up a new notifications microservice from scratch
samples.rationale: greenfield service — new architecture, needs full plan/build cycle

samples.description: introduce Redis to back a distributed job queue
samples.rationale: new dependency + new data model + cross-cutting — heavy by design rule 2

samples.description: migrate state management from Redux to Zustand across the app
samples.rationale: new architecture, sweeping cross-file change — heavy by design rule 2

samples.description: let users stay logged in across app restarts

risk.note: word 'auth' never appears — alias must be caught via session-persistence semantics

samples.rationale: touches session/auth surface — escalation铁律 forces HEAVY even though it sounds like a small toggle

samples.description: fix a typo in the public API reference docs for /v1/orders

risk.note: mentions public API but only edits docs — NEGATIVE control, must NOT force HEAVY

samples.rationale: docs/help context downgrades the public-API term to noise; no contract change → routes by size to LIGHT

samples.description: add an org_id filter so each tenant only sees their own invoices

risk.note: multi-tenant isolation — a filter bug leaks cross-tenant data

samples.rationale: tenant/org boundary is a hard surface — HEAVY regardless of small apparent diff

samples.description: shorten the jwt expiry from 24h to 1h

risk.note: one-number change but touches token lifetime logic

samples.rationale: token surface — hard; deceptively tiny diff, real blast radius on sessions

samples.description: add a Stripe webhook handler for payment.succeeded
samples.rationale: webhook and payment/billing are both hard surfaces — HEAVY

samples.description: log the full request body to help debug the checkout error

risk.note: sounds like adding one log line — actually a PII exposure risk

samples.rationale: PII/logging is a hard surface — a trivial-looking log line can leak sensitive data

samples.description: set the SameSite attribute on the session cookie
samples.rationale: cookie/session security surface — hard; CSRF/session implications

samples.description: refactor the helper that formats the Authorization header string

risk.note: auth-adjacent string formatting — proximity but not the auth decision itself

samples.rationale: soft hit: noteworthy but not force-escalated; routes by size (cross-file-ish → MEDIUM)

samples.description: update the word 'token' in the marketing landing copy

risk.note: 'token' appears but purely as marketing copy — noise

samples.rationale: noise hit must not escalate — trivial copy edit stays LIGHT

samples.description: add a nullable archived_at column to the orders table
samples.rationale: schema migration — hard surface, always HEAVY

samples.description: backfill user.display_name from first and last name
samples.rationale: data migration — hard surface, irreversible blast radius → HEAVY

samples.description: rename the qty column to quantity in order_items
samples.rationale: schema rename — hard surface, needs staged migration → HEAVY

samples.description: improve the checkout flow
samples.rationale: vague scope → unknown → conservative MEDIUM (never LIGHT); interactive runtime asks the user to confirm the lane via AskUserQuestion

samples.description: improve the checkout flow
samples.rationale: same vague scope; --auto adopts the conservative recommendation (MEDIUM) without stopping

samples.description: improve the checkout flow
samples.rationale: non-Claude runtime replaces AskUserQuestion with a numbered text list; still MEDIUM (unknown→MEDIUM)

samples.description: improve the checkout flow
samples.rationale: headless/non-Claude auto path adopts conservative MEDIUM, no stop
